query: Bitcoin BTC Ethereum ETH BNB XRP current prices and recent performance June 2026
answer:
I now have comprehensive, cross-validated data from two independent sources. Here is my full synthesis:

---

# Cryptocurrency Prices & Recent Performance — June 19, 2026

## Data Sources & Methodology
Data was retrieved from two independent APIs — **CoinGecko** and **CoinPaprika** — with an additional spot-check from **Google Finance**. All data points were captured at approximately **03:34 UTC on June 19, 2026**. The BTC prices across all three sources agreed within 0.07%, confirming data reliability.

---

## 1. Bitcoin (BTC)

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| **Current Price** | **$62,699–$62,706 USD** |
| **24-Hour Change** | -1.87% to -2.45% |
| **7-Day Change** | -1.26% to -1.57% |
| **30-Day Change** | **-18.30%** |
| **1-Year Change** | **-40.06%** |
| **Market Cap** | **~$1.257 trillion** |
| **Market Cap Rank** | #1 |
| **24h Trading Volume** | $26.9B–$31.6B |
| **Circulating Supply** | 20,044,787 BTC (of 21M max) |
| **All-Time High** | **$126,080–$126,173** (October 6, 2025) |
| **Distance from ATH** | **-50.26%** |

Bitcoin is trading at roughly half its all-time high from October 2025. The asset has declined ~18% over the past month and ~40% year-over-year, indicating a sustained bear market trend from the late-2025 highs.

---

## 2. Ethereum (ETH)

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| **Current Price** | **$1,696.90–$1,697.84 USD** |
| **24-Hour Change** | -2.01% to -2.76% |
| **7-Day Change** | **+1.30% to +1.97%** (positive) |
| **30-Day Change** | **-19.71%** |
| **1-Year Change** | **-32.53%** |
| **Market Cap** | **~$204.5–$204.9 billion** |
| **Market Cap Rank** | #2 |
| **24h Trading Volume** | $9.5B–$12.2B |
| **Circulating Supply** | ~120.2–120.7M ETH (uncapped) |
| **All-Time High** | **$4,946** (August 24, 2025) |
| **Distance from ATH** | **-65.67% to -65.69%** |

Ethereum is the only asset among the four showing a positive 7-day change, suggesting short-term relative strength. However, it remains down ~66% from its August 2025 ATH and is the second-worst performer from peak levels.

---

## 3. BNB (Binance Coin)

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| **Current Price** | **$577.54–$577.57 USD** |
| **24-Hour Change** | -2.42% to -3.19% |
| **7-Day Change** | -3.88% to -4.35% |
| **30-Day Change** | **-9.51%** |
| **1-Year Change** | **-10.06%** |
| **Market Cap** | **~$77.9–$80.4 billion** |
| **Market Cap Rank** | #4 |
| **24h Trading Volume** | $658M–$821M |
| **Circulating Supply** | ~134.8–139.2M BNB (of 200M max) |
| **All-Time High** | **$1,370–$1,371** (October 13, 2025) |
| **Distance from ATH** | **-57.79% to -57.84%** |

BNB has shown the most resilience on a relative basis — its 1-year decline of ~10% and 30-day decline of ~9.5% are far shallower than its peers. However, it is still down ~58% from its October 2025 ATH.

---

## 4. XRP (Ripple)

|---|---|

| **All-Time High** | **$3.65–$3.84** (CoinGecko: July 2025; CoinPaprika: January 2018) |
| **Distance from ATH** | **-68.66% to -70.23%** |

XRP is the worst performer on a 1-year and distance-from-ATH basis. Note: CoinGecko reports a July 2025 ATH of $3.65, while CoinPaprika references the historic January 2018 ATH of $3.84. Spot XRP ETFs were reportedly approved in November 2025.

---

## Cross-Asset Comparison Summary

| Coin | Price | 24h Δ | 7d Δ | 30d Δ | 1y Δ | Market Cap | From ATH |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **BTC** | $62,700 | -2.2% | -1.4% | -18.3% | -40.1% | $1.26T | -50.3% |
| **ETH** | $1,697 | -2.4% | **+1.6%** | -19.7% | -32.5% | $204.7B | -65.7% |
| **BNB** | $577.5 | -2.8% | -4.1% | -9.5% | -10.1% | $79.2B | -57.8% |
| **XRP** | $1.14 | -2.8% | -0.4% | -15.3% | -47.2% | $71.0B | -69.4% |

*(24h and 7d values are midpoints of the two-source ranges)*

---

## Key Market Observations

1. **Broad bear market**: All four major cryptocurrencies are trading 50–70% below their all-time highs set in mid-to-late 2025, indicating a deep and sustained drawdown.
2. **Short-term weakness**: All assets are down 2–3% in the last 24 hours, reflecting ongoing selling pressure.
3. **30-day declines of 9.5–19.7%** suggest an accelerating correction in June 2026.
4. **BNB relative outperformance**: BNB's 1-year decline of only ~10% stands out against 32–47% declines in the others.
5. **ETH short-term resilience**: Ethereum is the only asset with a positive 7-day change (~+1.6%).
6. **Total combined market cap** of these four assets: approximately **$1.61 trillion**.

key_facts: Bitcoin (BTC) is trading at ~$62,700 as of June 19, 2026, down ~50.3% from its ATH of $126,080-$126,173 set on October 6, 2025.
Ethereum (ETH) is trading at ~$1,697, down ~65.7% from its ATH of $4,946 set on August 24, 2025.
BNB is trading at ~$577.55, down ~57.8% from its ATH of $1,370-$1,371 set on October 13, 2025.
XRP is trading at ~$1.14, down ~69% from its ATH of $3.65-$3.84.
All four assets are down 2-3% in the last 24 hours, indicating broad market selling pressure.
All four assets have declined 9.5%-19.7% over the past 30 days, suggesting an accelerating correction in June 2026.
BNB has shown the most resilience with only a ~10% 1-year decline vs. 32-47% declines for BTC, ETH, and XRP.
Ethereum is the only asset with a positive 7-day change (+1.3% to +1.97%).
XRP is the worst performer from ATH levels (-69% to -70%) and on a 1-year basis (-47.2%).
The combined market cap of BTC, ETH, BNB, and XRP is approximately $1.61 trillion.
Spot XRP ETFs were reportedly approved in November 2025.
Data cross-validated across CoinGecko, CoinPaprika, and Google Finance — BTC prices agreed within 0.07%.
